notes: v247 — Your saved view can no longer be replaced by something worse. On rough network days a fallback download route could return a cut-short share list with no price changes — and it was replacing the full saved view the app had just shown you (that's the '4,300 perfect, then dumped to 2,927 with 0.00% everywhere' effect). Two fixes: a quality gate on every download route — a live list far smaller than your known market keeps your fuller saved view and quietly retries; and when a live list arrives without previous closes, today's changes are rebuilt from your saved history, so Gainers, Losers, ACCUM? and the change-based signal flags all keep working on degraded feeds.
